_doc: Mocked public-safe BPMN operate/diagnose responses for minimal lifecycle coverage.

rules.match: maestro bpmn job status job-triage-001 --output json
maestro bpmn instance incidents inst-triage-001 -f folder-public --output json
maestro bpmn instance incidents inst-triage-001 --folder-key folder-public --output json
maestro bpmn incident get inc-triage-001 --folder-key folder-public --output json
maestro bpmn instance variables inst-triage-001 -f folder-public --output json
maestro bpmn instance variables inst-triage-001 --folder-key folder-public --output json
maestro bpmn instance asset inst-triage-001 -f folder-public --output json
maestro bpmn instance asset inst-triage-001 --folder-key folder-public --output json
maestro bpmn instance element-executions inst-triage-001 -f folder-public --output json
maestro bpmn instance cursors inst-triage-001 -f folder-public --output json
